current_capability.software_claim: MMIO scalar, packed-dot, packed ReLU, bounded scratchpad VRELU/GEMM, single-matmul/FP8-matmul/Conv2D/attention-QK/attention-AV/MLP/SwiGLU/residual-add/bias-add/single-head-transformer-block/modern-decoder-block lowering smoke, and local descriptor-driven DRAM-to-scratchpad tensor prefetch prototype only

matmul_lowering_smoke.tiled_dispatch: M/N/K dimensions may be split into multiple current GEMM commands; host code stitches complete output tiles and accumulates int32 split-K partial outputs but does not perform MAC fallback
matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No graph partitioning, StableHLO/FlatBuffer parser, quantization calibration, hardware scheduler, CPU fallback planner, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: dense signed INT4 activation matrix plus per-8-K-block 2:4 sparse INT4 weight values and metadata positions
sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT4 activations, four nonzero weights and two distinct metadata positions per 2:4 group, pads K to 8-lane sparse blocks with INT4 zero values when needed, dispatches each sparse block through SDOT4_S4_2_4, and accumulates sparse block partial sums through OP_ADD
sparse_int4_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No sparse tensor GEMM, sparse tensor-core throughput, hardware metadata scheduler, pruning/calibration flow, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: signed INT2 matrices in the two's-complement range [-2, 1] with signed int32 accumulator output
int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates signed INT2 matrices, pads K to DOT16 width with INT2 zero values when needed, and dispatches every sixteen-lane INT2 MAC chunk through DOT16_S2 with signed int32 accumulation
int2_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor INT2 GEMM, BitNet production kernel, sparsity-aware INT2 tensor path, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.layout: raw FP8 E4M3 byte matrices with signed Q8.8 accumulator output
fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates raw FP8 byte matrices, pads K to DOT4 width with FP8 zero bytes when needed, and dispatches every four-lane FP8 MAC chunk through DOT4_FP8_E4M3 with signed Q8.8 accumulation
fp8_matmul_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No tensor FP8 GEMM, FP8 systolic path, FP16/BF16 accumulation, graph partitioning, quantization calibration, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

conv2d_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host materializes im2col and filter matrices, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every convolution MAC
conv2d_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No general convolution lowering, SAME padding, strided/dilated convolution, grouped/depthwise convolution, graph partitioning, hardware scheduler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_qk_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates batch/head dimensions and transposes each key matrix, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every QK score MAC
attention_qk_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No softmax, scaling, masking, value projection, KV-cache paging, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][tokens][key_tokens] int8 logits plus optional boolean mask
attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates shape, mask, and bounded logit spread before dispatch; NPU scalar MAX_U32 over biased int8 values finds row max, OP_SUB forms deltas, EXP2_NEG_Q0_8 computes power-of-two Q0.8 exponent approximations, and OP_ADD accumulates row sums; host applies mask and divides by row sum to produce Q0.8 attention weights
attention_softmax_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact exp/e softmax, hardware reciprocal/divider, vector softmax datapath, scale fusion, causal-mask hardware, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

attention_av_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][tokens][key_tokens] attention weights and [batch][heads][key_tokens][value_dim] value tensors
attention_av_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host iterates batch/head dimensions and requires prequantized attention weights, then reuses lower_matmul_smoke so current GEMM_S8/GEMM_S4 commands perform every AV context MAC
attention_av_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No softmax, scaling, masking, score normalization, KV-cache paging, fused attention kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.layout: rank-4 [batch][heads][capacity][dim] key/value caches plus rank-4 new key/value tensors and per-head cache lengths
kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates cache capacity and append lengths, preserves existing cache entries, dispatches each appended K/V scalar copy through OP_ADD(value, 0), writes appended tokens into fixed cache positions, and advances cache_lengths
kv_cache_update_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No paged KV cache, cache eviction, circular buffer, DMA-backed cache update, multi-batch decode cache manager, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production compiler backend is implemented

mlp_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates the two projection shapes, runs up-projection MACs through GEMM_S8, requantizes the hidden int32 accumulator to int8, runs activation through VRELU_S8, then runs down-projection MACs through GEMM_S8
mlp_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No GELU/SwiGLU, fused bias add, fused residual add, normalization, activation fusion, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

swiglu_lowering_smoke.lowering: Runs up-projection and gate-projection MACs through GEMM_S8, requantizes both hidden int32 accumulators to int8, dispatches elementwise gate products through scalar OP_MUL_LO, applies a fixed-point gate shift plus int8 saturation on host, then runs down-projection MACs through GEMM_S8
swiglu_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No SiLU/sigmoid approximation, vector gate datapath, fused SwiGLU kernel, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

bias_add_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates row-wise bias width, broadcasts the bias vector over input rows, dispatches each element through scalar OP_ADD, then interprets the signed int32 result and saturates to int8
bias_add_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector add opcode, fused bias path, arbitrary-rank broadcasting, normalization, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

residual_add_lowering_smoke.lowering: Host validates equal matrix shapes, then dispatches each element through scalar OP_ADD; host interprets the signed int32 result and saturates to int8
residual_add_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector add opcode, fused residual path, arbitrary broadcast add, normalization, graph partitioning, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

transformer_block_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_attention_av_smoke, lower_bias_add_smoke, lower_residual_add_smoke, lower_mlp_smoke, and a second lower_residual_add_smoke for a batch-1 single-head block with prequantized attention weights
transformer_block_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No QK generation inside the block, softmax, scaling, masking, layer normalization, multi-head merge, KV-cache paging, fused kernels, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

modern_decoder_block_lowering_smoke.lowering: Composes lower_rmsnorm_smoke, Q/K/V lower_matmul_smoke projections, host Q/K/V requantization, lower_rope_smoke, lower_attention_qk_smoke, host QK-score requantization, lower_attention_softmax_smoke, host Q0.8 attention-weight requantization, lower_attention_av_smoke, lower_bias_add_smoke, lower_residual_add_smoke, a second lower_rmsnorm_smoke, lower_swiglu_smoke, and a final lower_residual_add_smoke for a batch-1 single-head decoder block
modern_decoder_block_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No exact exp/e softmax, scaling fusion, multi-head merge, KV-cache paging/update, vector norm/RoPE/gate/softmax datapaths, fused kernels, Android delegate, graph compiler, or production compiler backend is implemented

rope_lowering_smoke.lowering: Dispatches every rotary-position embedding multiply, add, and subtract through scalar OP_MUL_LO, OP_SUB, and OP_ADD for even-width int8 matrices with prequantized int8 cosine/sine tables; host applies fixed-point shift and int8 saturation
rope_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector RoPE datapath, fused Q/K projection, KV-cache update, graph compiler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

rmsnorm_lowering_smoke.lowering: Dispatches every RMSNorm square, sum accumulation, input-weight multiply, and reciprocal-RMS scale multiply through scalar OP_MUL_LO and OP_ADD for int8 matrices with int8 weights; host computes reciprocal RMS and applies fixed-point shift plus int8 saturation
rmsnorm_lowering_smoke.not_claimed: No vector RMSNorm datapath, hardware reciprocal-square-root, fused transformer norm, graph compiler, Android delegate, or production compiler backend is implemented

descriptor_words: word0: opcode[3:0], stream_to_scratch[8], scratch_offset[21:16], byte_count[29:24], writeback_request[30], valid_owner[31]
word1: stream source byte address when stream_to_scratch is set; scalar OP_A otherwise
word2: scalar OP_B, or writeback destination byte address when writeback_request[30] is set for streamed GEMM
word3: scalar ACC or reserved for streamed GEMM

queue_depth_semantics.full_ring_encoding: not represented by the current 3-bit head/tail register interface

descriptor_queue_submission.implemented: Four-word descriptor fetch requires word0 valid_owner[31], advances a 3-bit head/tail ring only after accepted execution, launches existing scalar/GEMM datapath operations, optionally streams aligned descriptor-sourced DRAM words into the 64-byte scratchpad, counts read beats/bytes, supports aligned streamed GEMM output writeback through word2 when writeback_request[30] is set, counts write beats/bytes, rejects malformed or scalar writeback requests fail-closed, and faults autonomously on descriptor timeout
descriptor_queue_submission.not_claimed: This is a local RTL prototype path only; it is not an Android NNAPI, coherent IOMMU, production queue-depth, production DMA engine, vector writeback, scalar writeback, or phone-class accelerator proof

precision_matrix.path: DOT4_S8, RELU4_S8, VRELU_S8, and bounded GEMM_S8 through 64-byte MMIO scratchpad
DOT8_S4 packed dot, SDOT4_S4_2_4 sparse metadata dot, bounded sparse INT4 matmul lowering smoke, and bounded GEMM_S4 through 64-byte MMIO scratchpad; no compiler path
DOT16_S2 packed scalar dot prototype plus bounded scalar-dot INT2 matmul lowering smoke; no tensor INT2 GEMM/compiler path
no opcode, datapath, compiler lowering, or measured benchmark path
no opcode, datapath, compiler lowering, or measured benchmark path
DOT4_FP8_E4M3 scalar E4M3 dot prototype plus bounded scalar-dot FP8 matmul lowering smoke with signed Q8.8 output only; no tensor FP8 GEMM/compiler path

runtime_evidence_requirements: Runtime register constants match this manifest
BSP contract header exposes the same NPU perf offsets
Architecture documentation names each manifest perf counter
Descriptor queue registers expose only the local RTL 3-bit ring and must not be treated as production queue-depth or Android accelerator support
DMA tensor streaming evidence must include DESC_BYTES_READ and DESC_BYTES_WRITTEN from the measured NPU path when writeback_request[30] is used

Precision support beyond DOT4_S8, DOT8_S4, SDOT4_S4_2_4, DOT16_S2, DOT4_FP8_E4M3, RELU4_S8, VRELU_S8, GEMM_S8, and GEMM_S4 must remain blocked until the precision matrix and runtime tests identify the measured path
Verilator GEMM smoke test checks unsupported_ops, cycles, macs, ops, and errors counters
Android HAL/NNAPI acceleration remains blocked without e1_npu_nnapi.proof.json plus VTS/CTS/SELinux evidence
Benchmark evidence must bind model hashes, transcript hashes, perf counters, DMA traces, and CPU fallback accounting

missing_for_phone_class: 160 dense INT8 peak TOPS target evidence
80 dense INT8 sustained TOPS target evidence
512 sparse INT4 peak TOPS target evidence
BF16, FP16, FP8 tensor execution beyond scalar E4M3 dot, and INT2 tensor execution beyond scalar packed dot
AIDL HAL, VTS, CTS, and SELinux evidence
